content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/cca51d468a4ef5135da44f85bfda208b02581b83", "source_title": "Study design of the Fasting In diabetes Treatment (FIT) trial: a randomised, controlled, assessor blinded intervention trial which examines the effect of intermittent use of a fasting mimicking diet in patients with type 2 diabetes.", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "BACKGROUND\nCaloric restriction is an effective way to treat type 2 diabetes (DM2).", "direct_quote": "BACKGROUND\nCaloric restriction is an effective way to treat type 2 diabetes (DM2).", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Intermittent total fasting exerts similar metabolic effects, but may be even more challenging for most patients.", "direct_quote": "Intermittent total fasting exerts similar metabolic effects, but may be even more challenging for most patients.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "A fasting mimicking diet (FMD) was designed to achieve the metabolic benefits of total fasting, despite considerable calorie content.", "direct_quote": "A fasting mimicking diet (FMD) was designed to achieve the metabolic benefits of total fasting, despite considerable calorie content.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Study design of the Fasting In diabetes Treatment (FIT) tria."}]}
